title: Investigation into CoreFour Inc.’s compliance with PIPEDA
summary: The complainant made several allegations about the privacy practices of CoreFour Incorporated (“CoreFour” or the “respondent”) concerning Edsby, the respondent’s Kindergarten to Grade 12 (“ K-12 ”) learning management and analytics system, adopted by his children’s district school board (“school board”).
